use_cases: Visualizing hierarchical tree structures and nested relationships
Displaying organizational hierarchies or file system structures
Exploring nested data with interactive node clicking
ai_summary: An interactive dendrogram chart component from Airbnb that renders hierarchical tree structures using SVG paths and linear gradients. Nodes are clickable and display hierarchical relationships through connected links, making it ideal for visualizing nested data like org charts, taxonomies, or file systems.
